mapper.select:
SELECT id, config_id, tenant_id, app_id, merchant_private_key, alipay_public_key, alipay_root_cert, app_cert_public_key, notify_url, return_url, encrypt_key, sign_type, charset, format, gateway_url, sandbox_gateway_url, sandbox, encrypt_type, connect_timeout, read_timeout, proxy_host, proxy_port, is_deleted, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by FROM pay_config_alipay
AND config_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.configId}, '%')
AND tenant_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.tenantId}, '%')
AND app_id LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.appId}, '%')
AND alipay_public_key LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.alipayPublicKey}, '%')
AND create_by LIKE CONCAT(#{queryParams.createBy}, '%')
